title: Battle of Saleucami (Zann Consortium)
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Conjecture|legends}} {{Otheruses|Battle of Saleucami}} {{Battle |prev=[[Skirmish on Saleucami]]''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]'' |conc= |next=[[Ground Battle on Hypori]] |image=[[File:SaleucamiMission.jpg]] |name=Battle of Saleucami |conflict= |date=Between [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]] and [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]]''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]'' places this battle between the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] and the [[Battle over Coruscant]], which are respectively set in 0 ABY and 3 ABY according to ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''. |place=[[Saleucami/Legends|Saleucami]] |result=*Consortium victory *Tyber learns of battle [[Hypori droid factory|droid factory]] on [[Hypori/Legends|Hypori]] |side1=[[Hutt Cartel/Legends|Hutt Cartel]] |side2=[[Zann Consortium/Legends|Zann Consortium]] |side3= |side4= |commanders1=*Hutt field commander† |commanders2=*[[Tyber Zann]] *[[Urai Fen]] |commanders3= |commanders4= |unit1= |unit2= |unit3= |unit4= |forces1=*Cartel mercenaries *[[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]] *1 [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Commando/Legends|commando]] *2 [[Bantha-II cargo skiff/Legends|Bantha-II cargo skiffs]] *4 [[Infantry Support Platform/Legends|Infantry Support Platforms]] *[[All Terrain Attack Pod/Legends|All Terrain Attack Pods]] |forces2=*3 [[Defiler]]s *Grenadier squads *Mercenary Assault squad |forces3= |forces4= |casual1=All Cartel forces |casual2=Light |casual3= |casual4= |civilian= }} {{Quote|I want this planet in my pocket!|[[Tyber Zann]]|}} An '''attack''' on [[Saleucami/Legends|Saleucami]] was launched by the [[Zann Consortium/Legends|Zann Consortium]] to claim a listening outpost belonging to the [[Hutt Cartel/Legends|Hutt Cartel]]. ==Prelude== {{Quote|I want control of that comm outpost so we can do a little eavesdropping of our own. Saleucami needs to be softened up in preparation for our landing.|Tyber Zann|}} The battle was planned after the Cartel launched attacks on the [[Zann Consortium/Legends|Zann Consortium]] and destroyed one of the Consortium's barrack complexes. After [[Skirmish on Saleucami|corrupting]] the planet, [[Tyber Zann]] sent a [[Defiler]] to sabotage the shield generator. Afterwards, he sent [[Urai Fen]] to capture the planet. ==The battle== {{Quote|There he is, just like Jabba warned, an infiltrator!''"
"''Whether Jabba warned you or not is of no consequence. Stand down or be eliminated.''"
"''Double pay for the one who takes his head!|Hutt mercenaries and [[Urai Fen]]|}} Urai Fen was sent down along with several Grenadiers and Mercenary Assault Squads. Some of his troops were left behind to guard the landing zone for reinforcements. After destroying the Hutt Command Center, the Hutt Cartel struck back, killing the Mercenaries at the landing zone using mines. Urai expected this and made his way past the Hutt Cartel forces to capture the landing zone, killing several Hutt mercenaries to secure it. After doing so, the rest of the Zann Consortium forces dropped down and crushed the rest of the Hutt Cartel on Saleucami. ==Aftermath== {{Quote|It seems Jabba has been digging up the past. According to data we recovered on Saleucami, Jabba's stumbled across an old battle droid factory on Hypori that somehow survived the Clone Wars.|Urai Fen|}} After capturing Saleucami, Tyber discovered that [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]] had discovered a [[Hypori droid factory|droid factory]] on [[Hypori/Legends|Hypori]] that had somehow survived the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. Zann decided to [[Ground Battle on Hypori|capture]] that droid factory next. ==Appearances== *''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]'' ==Sources== *[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption Expansion: Prima Official Game Guide|''Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption Expansion'': Prima Official Game Guide]] ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Mission von Saleucami |es=Batalla de Saleucami (Guerra Civil Galáctica) }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Saleucami (Zann Consortium), battle of}} [[Category:Battles of Saleucami]] [[Category:Events of the Galactic Civil War]]
